calendar.matters:
Petition For An Order Finding That Real Property Is A Trust Asset; Petition For Instructions To Resolve Questions Of Trust Construction, For An Accounting, To Surcharge Trustees For Harm To The Trust; And Complaint For Unjust Enrichment
Off Calendar Aug-09-2021 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kevin Buggy, via ZOOM, for David Humphries, Petitioner; Mark Walther, via ZOOM, for Robin Greene, Trustee; Corban Porter, via ZOOM, for Oakwood University, Beneficiary.

At the outset, the court advises Mr. Buggy that it intends to deny the petition without prejudice as it does not appear that jurisdiction is proper. Mr. Buggy refers to probate code 17003 as the main support for the petition. The court then confirms with Mr. Buggy that the trustee resides out of state and that the real property is also located out of state. Mr. Buggy then suggests that perhaps filing an amended petition to omit the 850 petition may resolve the issue. The court disagrees.

After additional discussion including brief input from Mr. Walther and Mr. Porter, the court adopts its tentative ruling and the Petition for an Order Finding that Real Property is a Trust Asset, etc., is denied without prejudice.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
